justifications.temporal_understanding: The agent correctly understood the user's request for weekly appointments on Mondays at 10 AM for the next six weeks throughout the conversation.
justifications.conversational_efficiency: The agent made two check_availability calls in Turn 3, which could have been combined into a single call for the entire six-week period.
